## Feature Change

### Summary
> What capability does this add or change?

### Links
**Design doc:**

---

### Description
> What changed, what design decisions were made, and why this approach was chosen.
> If adding/changing an MCP tool or resource, include the name and a summary of its description.
> Focus on decisions, not diffs.

---

### Testing Evidence
> How was this tested? What evidence shows it works correctly?
> Include relevant test output, example tool invocations, or search results.

---

### Checklist
- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] Tool descriptions are clear and compelling (if MCP tools changed)
- [ ] Code follows project standards
